title: Complying with technology transfer sanctions
body: "This guidance contains information on technology transfer sanctions in the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (‘the Russia Regulations’).  It provides guidance on compliance and considers what information to include in licence applications related to the prohibitions in regulations 26, 42A, 46YA, 46Z30A, and 46Z35.  For general information regarding licensing for trade sanctions, please refer to the Russia sanctions statutory guidance. "
